name: Fricase De Pollo (Cuban-style Chicken Fricassee)
recipeIngredient: or mix sweet orange and lime juices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sour orange juice (or a mixture of sweet orange and lime juices), garlic, salt, and pepper in a container suitable for marinating chicken. Add the chicken pieces to the marinade, cover, and refrigerate 1 to 2 hours.
2. Remove the chicken from the marinade and blot excess moisture on paper towels. Set aside the marinade.
3. Warm the vegetable oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Brown the chicken pieces in batches to avoid overcrowding the pan. Return all the chicken to the pan with the remaining marinade.
4. Add onions and green bell pepper, sautéing with the chicken until the onions are translucent (about 3 minutes).
5. Add the reserved marinade, tomato sauce, white wine, capers, stuffed green olives, raisins, and potatoes. Reduce heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Transfer the chicken to a large serving dish and spoon the sauce over it.
